result:
If I could change the world in one way, I’d make high-quality education and reliable information freely accessible to everyone.

So many global problems—poverty, conflict, health crises, inequality, misinformation—become easier to solve when people have the tools to understand their world, think critically, and build better lives. Education doesn’t fix everything instantly, but it gives humanity a much stronger foundation for solving almost everything else.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
